import React from "react"; import { Quote } from "lucide-react"; export default function Founder() { return (
{/* LEFT COLUMN: Philosophy & Quote */}
Our Leadership

A superintendent's eye.
A craftsman's hands.

Sunwest Builds is the result of taking over a decade of commercial construction management and pointing it straight at the custom residential market. We don't just build homes; we engineer them.

“A lot of residential contractors operate by the seat of their pants. We run our renovations like a commercial site: Strict schedules, tight budgets, flawless execution, no surprises.”

— Justin & Matthew
{/* RIGHT COLUMN: The Team Bios */}
{/* Justin's Bio */}

Justin Carinci

Partner & Co-Founder

Equipped with an Advanced Diploma in Construction Engineering & Management from George Brown College, Justin spent over a decade managing high-rise towers for reputable developers like Menkes, Solmar, and Tribute Communities. This background wired him to execute strict timelines, multi-million dollar budgets, and millimeter-tight finishing in the custom residential space.

{/* Matthew's Bio */}

Matthew [Last Name]

Partner & Co-Founder

Graduating alongside Justin with the same Advanced Diploma from George Brown College, Matthew brings over a decade of expertise as a Project Manager and Site Supervisor. Spanning high-rise, subdivisions, and custom homes, Matthew is known for being meticulously detailed. He has built a formidable, trusted network of architects, engineers, and elite sub-trades.

{/* Shared Credentials / Stats */}
{[ ["Experience", "10+ Years Corporate"], ["Education", "George Brown College"], ["Specialty", "Structural Finishing"], ["Network", "Elite Sub-trades"], ["Region", "GTA & Surroundings"], ["Approach", "Owners On-Site"], ].map(([k, v]) => (
{k}
{v}
))}
); }
